productComposition.subtitle: Upload a product image, choose a scene, and fine-tune the blend

productComposition.scenePromptPlaceholder: Describe the scene, lighting, materials, composition, and mood you want for the product.
productComposition.scenePromptApplied: Scene prompt applied. You can fine-tune it before selecting a model.

productComposition.sceneApplied: Scene preset applied with recommended position and lighting
productComposition.sceneLibrary: Includes {{count}} common product scenes for hero images, detail pages, and social assets.
productComposition.autoFitApplied: Recommended position and lighting restored for the current scene
productComposition.centerApplied: Product moved back to the center
productComposition.settingsHint: Start with auto fit, then fine-tune position, lighting, and edge blending.
productComposition.adjustLocked: Detailed adjustments unlock after the previous steps, so the page does not start with too many controls.
productComposition.adjustHintModel: 3. Select an image model, then fine-tune and generate
productComposition.lightingHint: Match exposure to the background to avoid overexposed or washed-out results.
productComposition.shadowHint: A subtle shadow reduces the floating look; keep it lighter on white backgrounds.
productComposition.blendHint: Use Normal for most products. Try Overlay or Multiply for texture-heavy assets.
productComposition.featherHint: A small amount of feathering softens edges; too much will make the product blurry.
productComposition.modelStepLocked: Upload a product image and choose a scene first. Available image models will appear here.
productComposition.generatingHint: The current preview acts as a visual reference. Keep this page open.

scenePrompts.wood: warm wooden tabletop scene, natural home kitchen atmosphere, soft side lighting, realistic product placement, cozy commercial lifestyle photography
scenePrompts.grass: fresh outdoor grass scene, natural daylight, clean eco-friendly atmosphere, product placed naturally, realistic shadow, vibrant commercial photography
scenePrompts.beach: sunny beach lifestyle scene, soft sand and ocean tone, warm summer lighting, relaxed travel atmosphere, realistic product placement, premium advertising image
scenePrompts.city: modern city street scene, cinematic urban lighting, trendy commercial style, realistic product placement, shallow depth of field, premium street photography
scenePrompts.livingRoom: cozy modern living room scene, warm interior light, lifestyle product placement, soft fabric and home decor background, realistic commercial photography
scenePrompts.cafe: stylish cafe tabletop scene, warm ambient lighting, lifestyle composition, product placed near coffee and minimal props, realistic commercial photography
scenePrompts.minimalist: minimalist premium studio space, large clean negative space, soft gradient background, high-end product photography, balanced composition, refined lighting
scenePrompts.luxury: dark luxury showroom scene, dramatic warm spotlight, premium display platform, elegant shadows, reflective accents, high-end commercial product photography
